name: Cash-Secured Put Write
description: Sell OTM puts secured by cash. Collect premium with obligation to buy stock at strike. Systematic entry strategy with income generation.
entry_rules: Sell 1 OTM put at target delta and DTE
Maintain cash reserve equal to strike * 100 per contract
Avoid selling into earnings if not willing to own stock through event
exit_rules: Let put expire worthless if OTM at expiry
Buy back if premium decays to 80% of entry credit
Accept assignment if ITM — transition to covered call
roll_rules: If put is ITM with > 5 DTE, consider rolling down and out
Roll to next monthly if current put expires worthless
If assigned, switch to covered call template
objective: Generate income from put selling with willingness to acquire stock at discount

risk_profile.max_loss: Strike price * 100 - premium received (stock goes to zero)

best_environment: Neutral to bullish, elevated IV, fundamentally sound underlying you would own
